description: Next.js App Router rules from nextjs_rules.md

rules.name: use_next_link
rules.description: Use next/link instead of raw <a> for internal navigation
rules.message: Raw <a> tag used for internal link. Use <Link href="..."> from 'next/link'.
rules.fix_suggestion: import Link from 'next/link'; then use <Link href="/path">text</Link>.

rules.name: use_next_image
rules.description: Use next/image instead of for automatic optimisation
rules.message: Raw tag found. Use from 'next/image' for automatic optimisation and lazy loading.
rules.fix_suggestion: import Image from 'next/image'; then use <Image src="..." alt="..." width={x} height={y} />.

rules.name: no_secrets_in_source
rules.description: Secrets must never be in Next.js source — only in .env.local
rules.message: Hardcoded Next.js secret detected. Store in .env.local and access via process.env.
rules.fix_suggestion: Move to .env.local: NEXTAUTH_SECRET=... and reference as process.env.NEXTAUTH_SECRET.

rules.name: prefer_server_components
rules.description: Only add 'use client' when state, effects, or browser APIs are required
rules.message: 'use client' directive found. Verify this component needs client-side rendering — prefer Server Components.
rules.fix_suggestion: Remove 'use client' if this component has no state, effects, or event handlers.

rules.name: lazy_load_non_critical
rules.description: Lazy-load heavy or rarely-used components with next/dynamic
rules.message: Heavy component imported statically. Use dynamic(() => import('...'), { ssr: false }) for client-side-only modules.
rules.fix_suggestion: import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'; const Map = dynamic(() => import('./Map'), { ssr: false });

rules.name: no_legacy_pages_api_in_app_router
rules.description: Do not introduce legacy pages/api routes in an App Router project
rules.message: Legacy pages/api route detected in an App Router project. Use Route Handlers (app/api/route.ts).
rules.fix_suggestion: Create app/api/your-endpoint/route.ts with GET/POST handler exports instead.

rules.name: use_next_navigation_hooks
rules.description: Use next/navigation hooks for imperative navigation, not useRouter from next/router
rules.message: Importing from 'next/router' in App Router project. Use 'next/navigation' instead.
